backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a student experience sharing platform with CRUD for posts, category filtering, and stats (top upvoted/connected posts, category counts). Uses MixinStorage for blob storage and stores posts in a Map with auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Dashboard auto-retry/polling feature (replacing manual reload with automatic recovery using React Query retry and refetchInterval) is implemented in useQueries.ts and Dashboard.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, key UI components, hooks, utilities, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the full light and dark color theme (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Memu Nerchunnavi | మేము నేర్చున్నవి', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with five routes (/, /share, /post/:id, /dashboard, /about) wrapped in a LanguageProvider and a year-gate that blocks navigation until the user selects a college year via YearSelectionModal.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header containing the logo, pill navigation, language toggle, and a Bell/BellOff mute toggle button that persists mute state via the sounds utility.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Card component displaying a post snippet with emoji category badge, time ago, author year, and read-only upvote/connect counts; links to the post detail page and exports categoryConfig and formatTimeAgo utilities.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Renders share buttons for a post supporting WhatsApp sharing, clipboard copy, and the native Web Share API, with compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Full-screen modal that prompts the user to select their college year and optionally enter a college name, persisting the selection via useYearSelection.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context that manages English/Telugu language state (persisted in sessionStorage) and exposes a translation lookup function t().
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated), invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all posts, posts by category, a single post, stats, and creating a post via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Simple hook that reads and writes the selected college year and college name to sessionStorage, dispatching a custom event on year change.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and a dot-grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for SeniorCompass, displaying a mission statement, a 4-step how-it-works grid, and a core values section with a banner image and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders an analytics dashboard showing platform stats (total posts, upvotes, connections), top posts by upvotes/connects, category breakdown, and year distribution using data fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main feed page with a trending posts section, category filter tabs, and a paginated list of PostCards, fetching posts via React Query and supporting i18n and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Renders a full-detail view for a single post identified by URL param, showing content, category, author year, timestamp, upvote/connect actions, and share buttons with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Renders a form page for submitting a new peer advice post, with category selection, a character-limited textarea, client-side validation, and a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for all UI text across the app, including navigation, forms, post cards, and page content. Exports a `Language` type and a `translations` object keyed by locale.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides Web Audio API-based sound utilities with mute persistence via sessionStorage. Exports `playBubblePop` (for upvotes/interactions) and `playTypingTick` (for textarea keystrokes).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom fonts (Bricolage Grotesque, DM Sans), OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 17), summarizing the platform's purpose, architecture, existing features, and known issues for a bilingual anonymous college feedback-sharing app.
